EXPLANATION: The paper was found as a presentation at the NeurIPS 2025 Workshop on Vision–Language Model Real-World Deployment, with matching authors and title. It is a legitimate academic workshop paper.

FOUND_TITLE: Efficient inference scaling for safety assurance
